case_title: TUEN CHEUNG CHAN et al VS. ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-26-2008 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-12-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-26-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-26-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
TRIAL RESET TO SEP-26-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF SEP-17-2008 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY CHAN, TUEN CHEUNG HUNG, TUEN YUK CHAN, BELLA AS TO DEFENDANT ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-17-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF PLTF THAT DEFT HAS NOT BEEN SERVED WITH THE CLAIM. FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAN, BELLA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAN, TUEN CHEUNG HUNG, TUEN YUK CHAN, BELLA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY $275.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $350.00, FROM THE EVIDENCE SUBMITTED THE COURT FOUND NOT MORE THAN 1 HOUR OF LEGAL SERVICES RELATED TO DEFENSE OF THE WRONGFUL EVICTION CASE, AS DISTINGUISHED FROM THE UNLAWFUL DETAINER CASE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
